# Frontend Development Skill

## Overview
Master modern React development practices for building scalable, maintainable UI components in ExamForge. This skill covers component design, state management, performance optimization, and accessibility.

## Topics Covered
- React fundamentals and hooks
- Component architecture and composition
- State management patterns
- Performance optimization
- Accessibility (a11y)
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- Dark mode implementation
- Animation with Framer Motion

## Learning Objectives
After completing this skill, you will be able to:
- Build reusable, maintainable React components
- Implement complex state management patterns
- Optimize component performance
- Create accessible UI components
- Design responsive layouts
- Implement smooth animations

## Prerequisites
- JavaScript ES6+ knowledge
- Basic React understanding
- HTML/CSS fundamentals
- npm/yarn package management

## Key Concepts

### Component Patterns
- Functional components with hooks
- Custom hooks for logic reuse
- Compound components
- Render props and Higher-Order Components

### Performance
- Code splitting and lazy loading
- Memoization strategies
- Bundle size optimization
- Image optimization

### Accessibility
- ARIA labels and roles
- Keyboard navigation
- Screen reader support
- Color contrast requirements

## Resources
- [React Documentation](https://react.dev)
- [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com)
- [Framer Motion](https://www.framer.com/motion/)
- [Web Accessibility Guidelines](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)

## Quick Start
See `scripts/setup.sh` to configure your development environment.
